prompt: Напиши CLI-утилиту, которая ищет дубликаты файлов в каталоге по содержимому и сохраняет JSON со списком групп.
expected_steps: clarify recursive scan depth and hash algorithm
create small CLI project scaffold with package module, README and tests
define JSON contract for duplicate groups
hash file contents and group identical files deterministically
add tests with temporary files and CLI behavior
run project-scoped tests and produce usage example
acceptance_criteria: duplicate files are detected by content hash
all tests run from generated project root
